element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic—player learns grid-based destruction without enemy pressure in early levels
Navigation structure introduced alongside walls; teaches spatial planning
Destroys all connected destructible objects; teaches chaining for bonus points
Obstacles that cannot be destroyed; complicates pathfinding and sequencing
Chases Mario, knocks down objects, creates time pressure and disruption
Projectile hazards that kill on contact; adds dodging skill requirement
Opens to move enemies harmlessly into background; provides tactical relief
Collectibles that appear occasionally; reward optimal destruction sequencing

typical_relief_triggers: Opening doors to remove enemies from playfield
Clearing all destructible objects in a level
Reaching safe platform after escape sequence
typical_tension_triggers: Spike entering the level and chasing Mario
Running out of ladder access after destroying supports
Realizing optimal destruction order was missed, trapping Mario
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Puzzle-driven with escalating time pressure; early levels allow deliberate planning, mid-to-late levels introduce enemies and projectiles forcing faster decision-making

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus items appear occasionally but are not required for level completion

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory puzzle-solving with minimal threats; player learns destruction mechanics and spatial planning without enemy pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Enemy introduction (Spike and fireballs) increases time pressure; destruction sequencing becomes critical to avoid trapping
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex multi-layered puzzles with aggressive enemy behavior; requires both optimal pathfinding and reactive dodging
notable_spikes: Introduction of Spike as active pursuer
Appearance of fireballs adding projectile hazard
Levels with both indestructible barrels and multiple enemies requiring extreme precision

notable_level_patterns.description: Destroying objects in wrong order blocks progress; player must abort and restart if they realize mistake mid-level. Teaches optimal destruction sequencing.
Spike and/or fireballs present; player must destroy required objects while avoiding threats. Combines puzzle-solving with reflexive dodging.
Multiple objects destroyed in sequence (often via bombs) award bonus points. Encourages risk-taking on optimal solutions.
